trade.query:
PoE2 trade manual tune memo
用途: Tradeリンク確認後、結果が広すぎる/狭すぎる時の手動調整または共有用。貼り付け用検索式ではありません。
League: Runes of Aldur
Status: Online only
Rarity: Rare
Category: Accessory / Ring
Base/type hint: Ring
URL filters: Official URL / Count >= 2

[Trade filters]
- Flat physical to attacks 9+ avg / T1-T2商材
- Flat fire to attacks 18+ avg / T1-T2商材
- Flat cold to attacks 16+ avg / T1-T2商材
- Flat lightning to attacks 22+ avg / T1-T2商材
- Life 80+ / T1-T2商材
- Total elemental resistance 85+ / T1-T2商材
- Attack speed 12%+ / T1-T2商材

[Tighten first]
- +# to maximum Life or Mana (main filter)
- +#% to Elemental Resistances (second filter)

[Manual target rolls]
- Flat damage to attacks: T1-T2 / phys avg 9+ / fire 18+ / cold 16+ / lightning 22+
- Life: T1-T2 / 80+
- Total resists: T1-T2合算 / 85%+
- Attack/Cast Speed: T1-T2 / 12%+

[Optional upside]
- Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix (nice to have)

[Avoid]
- offline listings for manual checks
- low-tier single-mod rares
- resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook

required.label: +# to maximum Life or Mana
required.why: start here when filtering

required.label: +#% to Elemental Resistances
required.why: use Count >= 2 if supply is thin

preferred.label: Damage, Accuracy, or Cast Speed suffix
preferred.why: raise price if the first filters hit

minimums.label: Flat damage to attacks
minimums.why: 攻撃向け指輪は高tierフラットが商材ライン

minimums.label: Life
minimums.why: Life 50台は自用品寄り。売るなら高tierと組み合わせ

minimums.label: Total resists
minimums.why: 耐性だけなら高合算でないと価格が伸びにくい

minimums.label: Attack/Cast Speed
minimums.why: フラットやLifeと同時に付くと差別化しやすい

avoid: resistance-only items with no life/resource/damage hook
